prose: **Oxygen (O₂) frontier-orbital analysis** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals, no density fitting), PySCF backend, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3 (triplet ground state). Geometry: from user-supplied file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz`, single-point calculation (not relaxed). SCF converged in 7 cycles. **HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.2880586 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital energies; this is not a vertical excitation energy). HOMO at −8.8739616 eV, LUMO at −3.5859031 eV. Vertical ionization potential (Koopmans) = 8.8739616 eV; vertical electron affinity = 3.5859031 eV. No convergence issues or warnings reported; integrity status **ok, trustworthy**.
